features: ⭐【Package Content】：Include a roll of 16m x 43cm of wrapping paper.Convenient to use, no fold marks and white edge.
⭐【Unique design】:Kraft and green tree printed,the design will make gift more pretty and shining.And it is a joy to wrap gifts in lovely wrapping paper.

⭐【Better Service】：If you are not satisfied with it, we would like to full refund for you. Your problem can be solved in 24 hours.
